description: Create a fully constrained ribbed corner bracket in SolveSpace. The bracket features an L-shaped base profile with its outer corner at (0,0), a horizontal leg of 60mm x 10mm, and a vertical leg of 80mm x 10mm. This base is extruded symmetrically to a total width of 40mm. A triangular stiffening rib with vertices at (10, 10), (45, 10), and (10, 60) is centered on the bracket with a total thickness of 6mm. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ribbed_bracket.slvs.
